testcase.name: EvolutionAgent (US-003) > happy path: LLM 成功 → insight 写入原子事务 · isFallback=false
EvolutionAgent (US-003) > fallback path: schema 无效 · previousInsight 可用 → isFallback=true · 不写 insight
EvolutionAgent (US-003) > cumulative merge: (fresh ∪ prev) 去重 · avoidList 同理 · 不超 top 10
enqueueIfThresholdMet threshold boundaries > count=5 → 触发 enqueue (threshold:5)
enqueueIfThresholdMet threshold boundaries > count=19 → 不触发 enqueue
enqueueIfThresholdMet threshold boundaries > count=20 → 触发 enqueue (threshold:20)
enqueueIfThresholdMet threshold boundaries > count=49 → 不触发 enqueue
enqueueIfThresholdMet threshold boundaries > count=50 → 触发 enqueue (threshold:50)
enqueueIfThresholdMet threshold boundaries > count=99 → 不触发 enqueue
enqueueIfThresholdMet threshold boundaries > count=100 → 触发 enqueue (threshold:100)
AC-10: 5 concurrent same-account feedback → exactly 1 enqueue > 5 parallel enqueueIfThresholdMet calls → queue.add called exactly once (threshold:5)
AC-10: 5 concurrent same-account feedback → exactly 1 enqueue > counts 1-4 and 6-10 do NOT trigger enqueue
AC-10: 5 concurrent same-account feedback → exactly 1 enqueue > jobId deduplication: concurrent rush at threshold uses same jobId
